nasb.text: But I want you to be free from concern. One who is unmarried is concerned about the things of the Lord, how he may please the Lord;

esv.text: I want you to be free from anxieties. The unmarried man is anxious about the things of the Lord, how to please the Lord.

cnv.text: 我願你們無所掛慮。沒有娶妻子的人，掛念的是主的事，想怎樣去得主喜悅；

ccb.text: 我希望你们无牵无挂。未婚的男子可以专心于主的事，想着怎样讨主的喜悦。

csbs.text: 我希望你们一无挂虑。没有结婚的男人所挂虑的是主的事，是要怎样讨主的喜悦；
